PushButton.Name: LoadSignal
PushButton.Help: Load Signal(s) and Spectra of a Data File

PushButton.Name: OverlaySignal
PushButton.Help: Load Signal(s) of a Data File and overlay with current signals

NonEditCombobox.Name: DataFile
NonEditCombobox.Help: Select from most previously loaded Data Files

NonEditCombobox.Name: MethodFile
NonEditCombobox.Help: Select from most previously loaded Method Files

NonEditCombobox.Name: SelectCalcType
NonEditCombobox.Help: Set calculation type of current method

NonEditCombobox.Name: SelectCalcBase
NonEditCombobox.Help: Set calculation base of current method

NonEditCombobox.Name: FRptLayout
NonEditCombobox.Help: Select from most previously used Report Template

PushButton.Name: ReportPreview
PushButton.Help: Show Report Preview using current template, method and data file

PushButton.Name: ReportPrint
PushButton.Help: Print report using current template, method and data file
